title: AvailabilityRule
description: A recurring weekly window of admin availability that the /book calendar expands into concrete bookable slots. Stored in the 'availability' collection (same name on web + iOS). Web admin writes; iOS reads. See BOOKING_SYSTEM_CANONICAL.md.

slotMinutes.description: Length of each generated slot. Default 30.

maxBookingsPerDay.description: Cap on bookings per day. Default 5.

timezone.description: IANA tz for the times, e.g. 'Asia/Amman'. Default 'Asia/Amman'.
